mnemonic: A person walking, seen from the side.
A wide-open square mouth. It hides inside a huge number of kanji.
The sun seen through a window; marks time and light.
A crescent moon; on the left it can mean flesh/body.
A trunk with branches above and roots below.
A splash of water spraying in every direction.
A person ablaze, arms flailing, sparks flying off.
A little sprout standing on the ground line.
A figure kneeling gracefully, arms folded.
A swaddled baby with its arms sticking out.
An eye stood up on its end.
An open palm with the fingers spread wide.
A mouth with sound-lines rising out of it.
Two swinging saloon-door gates.
A cart seen from above: axle, body, wheels.
Raindrops caught falling inside a window frame.
A person stretching arms and legs as wide as they go.
A plot divided into paddies by walking paths.
A person planted firmly on the ground.
A king with gold nuggets buried under a roof.
An ear with a long dangling lobe.
Three peaks in a row, the middle one tallest.
Legs running out ahead of everyone else.
Three levels — heaven, earth, people — joined by one ruler.
